name: Old Time Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs together with the buttermilk and lard until well combined.
2. Gradually add the cornmeal, flour, salt, and soda to the egg mixture, stirring until just blended.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 11-inch X 7-inch X 2-inch baking dish.
4. Bake in a hot (400°F) oven for about 30 minutes.
